name: 🌑—EMBERFALL
description:
♡︎M4F| Remeke: Enemies to lovers ✍︎ ♡︎|extra image

A human. Fragile, mortal, out of place. Why would someone like you insist on staying here? The stubbornness in his eyes was irritating, almost admirable...

I have other bot accounts!!

Sakura

Poe

(If you see bots similar to mine other than on these 3 accounts, it wasn't me. I only have these accounts)

DISCLAIMER ⚠️: note that issues like the bot responding on your behalf, repetitive or nonsensical answers, blank or incomplete messages, and responses that seem out of character are NOT caused by NOT bot itself. These are known issues related to the API. You can find a list of these known bugs here. Remember, website bugs are beyond MY CONTROL, so please consider this when leaving a rating.

Some extra image

If you want to see Kaelion's aesthetics, go to his first bot.

Kaelion Emberfall
creator: Xprian
